label: S0_baseline
commit_head_at_run: 38b5208 (sibling pane's Sprint 1 manual-tools wiring; S0.1 bench_all + S1.3 monitoring parallel patches already applied before run)
note: This is NOT the pre-roadmap baseline. The true pre-roadmap baseline is the audit at commit 61d7807 (vault/audits/benchmark_audit_2026-06-01T12-34-21Z.md). This S0_baseline file captures the first bench_all.py run after the S0.1 bench_all.py orchestrator was authored AND the S1.3 monitoring observe.py parallel-probes patch was applied. It is the post-S0/S1.3 measurement used as the comparison anchor for S2-S4.

results.verify_spp_note: 300s timeout cap of bench_all hit; raw value not the true verify_spp runtime. The serial 155.3s baseline (audit 61d7807) is the authoritative number for this benchmark.
results.pytest_summary: 43 passed in 15.88s (inner pytest time; outer includes orchestrator overhead)
results.monitoring_note: post-S1.3 (parallel probes); pre-S1.3 baseline was 6002ms in audit 61d7807. ~26% reduction confirmed.
results.session_hub_note: post-sibling-pane 38b5208 (added compound_audit + drift_report DETACHED spawns to hub); pre-sibling baseline was 246ms in audit 61d7807. Within Pane 1 scope this is now a documented baseline drift (NOT a regression caused by Pane 1 work).

regression_attribution: Smoke run was quick-mode only (8 benches in ~10s). Full-mode S0_baseline ran 15 benches over ~9 min and triggered AV cold-scan on more binaries (Python interpreter, node, V-gate test scripts). T-WIN-AV-001 variance accounts for the +26 to +81% spread across cold-call benches. Not a code regression.
scope_pane_1: tools/ verify_spp.py modules/monitoring/ modules/pp_agents/ modules/osa/ vault/
out_of_scope_for_pane_1_but_observed: session_hub_ms regression vs audit (sibling pane 38b5208 modified hooks/session_start_hub.js)
